narration.headline: Uzbekistan Well Placed for Historic Knockout Push

If they fall short of that automatic spot, they still have a slim back-door route to qualify as one of the best third-placed teams. Because the group matches have not yet kicked off, all four teams sit level on zero points, meaning their destiny is entirely in their own hands.
